message:
feat(registry,net): name ownership watchers + TCP connect rearm fix

registry.rs: Add NameWatchRef-based ownership monitoring system with
watch/unwatch, region-close cleanup, and buffered notifications.

stream.rs: Extract rearm_connect_registration() to fix oneshot reactor
semantics during connect, with CountingReactor test infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
